response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the resume shows no substantive Java/Kotlin/JVM work, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, and no IDE internals or language tooling background. Java appears only as a brief mention alongside DLang on robotics/orchestration projects over a decade ago. Recent work is centered on TypeScript/Node.js, AI agent tooling, and a Dlang-based GIS platform — none of which align with the enterprise JVM IDE focus of this role.
strengths: Long track record of shipping complex systems across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring dojos, workshops)
Experience building developer tooling, test runners, and frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, MCP generators)
concerns: No demonstrable Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise Java framework experience
Java/Kotlin exposure is minimal and dated; Kotlin not listed at all
No IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM-deep work evident in the history

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and dev-tooling background
